_comment: Canonical ld-config template for ALL life-dashboard producers, both platforms. Each seed's installer assembles the live config.json from this shape. Platform-specific fields are noted inline: owner/partner.imessage and morning_triage.exclude.imessage_handles are read only by the Plow agent seed (iMessage triage); morning_triage.exclude.slack_handles is read only by the Hermes agent seed (Slack triage). The unused field is harmless on the other platform.

sports._comment: Followed teams for the kiosk sports card. Demo default — customize to your teams. abbr = ESPN team abbreviation; sport/league name its ESPN scoreboard.
